universalChecklist: Share your itinerary with a trusted person (and check in regularly).
Keep digital + paper copies of your passport/ID and insurance.
Use a crossbody bag and keep essentials close in crowded areas.
Trust your gut. If something feels off, leave.
Know your accommodation address and nearest transit stop.
emergencyTips: Save local emergency numbers and your embassy contact.
If you feel unsafe: go to a busy place (hotel, café, store) and ask for help.
Keep your phone charged and carry a small power bank.
Have a backup plan for getting home at night (ride app + taxi number).
travelEssentials: Door stopper (for extra peace of mind)
